# Add Rule to Skill

I want to add a new rule/pattern to an existing skill.

**Target skill**: {{ skill-name }}
**Rule/Pattern**: {{ description }}

Format this as a new section in the existing SKILL.md with:
1. Section header
2. Explanation of what and why
3. GOOD code example
4. BAD code example (what to avoid)
5. Bullet-point rules

Append it to the appropriate position in the skill file, maintaining the existing structure and style.
